title: Kumoh Configuration
description: Configuration file for Kumoh — a Cloudflare Workers framework powered by Hono + Drizzle.

name.description: The application name. Used for the worker name and resource naming (e.g. D1 database, KV namespace, R2 bucket, queue).

routes.description: Path to the Hono app entry file.

crons.description: Directory containing cron handler files. Each file exports `cron` (schedule string) and a default handler.

queues.description: Directory containing queue consumer files. Each file's name becomes the queue name.

schema.description: Path to the Drizzle schema file. Enables D1 database provisioning.

deploy.description: Deploy state — auto-managed by `kumoh deploy`. Do not edit manually.
